subject: Sync changes to ccsdk/sli for GRA microservice
commit_message:
Sync changes to ccsdk/sli for GRA microservice

Sync changes made to ccsdk/sli to support GRA microservice. Details
of changes follow:

update on exec-sls-DG for appc integration

Signed-off-by: Ganesh <ganesh.c@samsung.com>
Change-Id: If8f9338ed7d75be3ce416e31cb7b61db862fd0ef
Issue-ID: CCSDK-3499

Release version 1.2.1

Release version 1.2.1 of ccsdk/sli

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3237
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ie33b0e730465a1231e4654fdc561c1f22d08ff7d

Fix yangparser invocation

Fix YangParser invocation in restconf-provider to address breaking
change in ODL Aluminum release.

Issue-ID: SDNC-1515
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I9974889bfa9bbd11077c95275c0cb8ba59b1b0bb

Release version 1.2.2 and roll to next snapshot

Release version 1.2.2 of ccsdk/sli and roll to next snapshot

Issue-ID: SDNC-1515
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ie301afd08ba9039b510b55f38b7be5ad8d1773cb

Release Alu SR3 version (1.2.3) of ccsdk/sli

Release Alu SR3 (1.2.3) version of ccsdk/sli

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3285
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ibe83d8161ef5248bf10571f9b30799168cc7a2bb

Add a .gitreview file

otherwise git-review will push commits to master branch by default

Issue-ID: SDNC-1515
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: I7170c024d2dbb672414f072e302d09015c19101f

Updating odlparent's version to 2.1.5

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3330
Signed-off-by: Singal, Kapil (ks220y) <ks220y@att.com>
Change-Id: I3aecb3d28b405cf3612f2f688a756514876a7223

Upgrading akka cluster dependency

Updating odlparent versions to 2.1.7-SNAPSHOT

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3333

Change-Id: Ia5da682990acbf99a2026393f8dea511ccca4420
(cherry picked from commit e12652babc98c403fefead2c83395a5439df7dac)

Relasing 1.2.4 and Rolling to next snapshot

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3330
Change-Id: Ib073f4875f07271ca752a8062f8484e4f6a2a828

[SDNOPT1-1202]:update ccsdk-sli/adaptors/aai-service to latest v24 interface and code changes for Narad DSL queries

Allow env variables to be used in MSO adaptor

Allow env variables to be used in MSO adaptor properties file

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3360
Signed-off-by: lalena.aria <lalena.aria@att.com>
Change-Id: Ifd7abee6380c82bdde38b2476b977a91d3cbcf7f

Synching artifacts and features-all poms

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3368
Signed-off-by: Singal, Kapil (ks220y) <ks220y@att.com>
Change-Id: I1fc01511aa98dd8b416a3ff6dd378ae95399e3aa

Changing slf4j-simple dependency from compile to test

features.xml for ccsdk-sql-resource is adding sll4f-simple which shouldn't be there

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3368
Signed-off-by: Singal, Kapil (ks220y) <ks220y@att.com>
Change-Id: I2c24aa10b91300ba9fbdc4e66ffe6e289582a7cf
(cherry picked from commit bab5ed7d5298d4c5e06d4656a90c45d4959e8026)

RA: Add 2 fields in RA parameters from DG context

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3372
Signed-off-by: Stan Bonev (sb5356) <sb5356@att.com>
Change-Id: I7e107c1b1c15dc0336c604b102b11293ee4b8920
(cherry picked from commit eb36deb15c4882ec373e972eab40fcb947b5f002)

[SDNCP-2117] Add env support in partners.json

[SDNCP-1845] Fixes for Veracode errors

Contains fixes for the following issues identified by Veracode
scans:
470   Use of Externally-Controlled Input to Select Classes or Code ('Unsafe Reflection') - in SvcLogicClassResolver.java
611   Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference - in mdsal adaptor (RestService.java)

[SDNCP-2172] Add missing mapping entries to aai-path.properties

Some entries in the legacy sli-adaptors version of aai-path.properties are
missing from the current netsys/ccsdk-sli version.  This change adds those
entries.  Note: there are entries in this version that are not in the legacy
version, possibly because they are used in some ONAP flows not used
internally.  There is no need to sync this change back to sli-adaptors

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>

[SDNCP-2194] Add support for AAI bulk update of subnet orchestration status

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>

[SDNCP-2194] Fix error in subnet length property name

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>

[SDNCP-2194] Fix AAI uri in bulk update

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>

[SDNCP-2194] Fix network id parameter in bulk update

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>
Change-Id: I1dd6d0b8621b92ec48bdc631a158338148aa9a46
